title: Within the Father's House

c_lines: Music: 'Franconia' Johann Balthasar König, 1738.  Setting: William Henry Havergal, 1847.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2013 Revision.

1.raw_text: Within the Father's house The Son hath found His home; And to His temple suddenly The Lord of Life hath come.

2.raw_text: The doctors of the law Gaze on the wondrous child, And marvel at His gracious words Of wisdom undefiled.

3.raw_text: Yet not to them is giv'n The mighty truth to know, To lift the fleshly veil which hides Incarnate God below.

4.raw_text: The secret of the Lord Escapes each human eye, And faithful pond'ring hearts await The full epiphany.

5.raw_text: Lord, visit Thou our souls, And teach us by Thy grace Each dim revealing of Thyself With loving awe to trace;
